purpose: Pure-function serialisation and deserialisation helpers for MLS application messages of kind 13 (leave intent). No side effects, no React, no IDB. Mirrors pollSync.ts / scoreSync.ts.

public_api.name: LEAVE_INTENT_KIND
public_api.description: MLS application-message kind discriminator for leave-intent payloads.

public_api.name: LeaveIntentPayload
public_api.description: Shape of the parsed leave-intent payload. Only contains the pubkey of the member who wishes to leave.

public_api.name: serialiseLeaveIntent
public_api.description: Returns JSON.stringify({ pubkey: payload.pubkey }). Emits no extra fields.

public_api.name: parseLeaveIntent
public_api.description: Parses the JSON string and returns { pubkey } if typeof parsed.pubkey === 'string', otherwise null. Catches JSON.parse errors and returns null.
